notes: Methodology/framework paper proposing IACDM (8-phase process). No original empirical study: the '20+ projects' are non-public internal anecdotal records, and all quantitative evidence (METR, Palmer, GitClear) is cited from others. Author explicitly defers validation to future work and frames limitations as testable hypotheses. A tool-build signal exists (two VSCode extensions / Versus repo), but no empirical evaluation of it is reported.
